title: audit bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[3.1.5-7.0.1]
- Modify the error message when audit is disabled to mention that it may be disabled [Orabug: 37040467]

[3.1.5-7]
- ausearch-checkpoint race condition fix
  Resolves: RHEL-86897

[3.1.5-6]
- Update end of event detection mechanism
  Resolves: RHEL-78323

[3.1.5-5]
- ausearch: correct search for DAEMON related events
- allow hex digits when interpreting tty data
  Resolves: RHEL-82279
- Fix TTY hostname in log messages
  Resolves: RHEL-78323
full_text:
[3.1.5-7.0.1]
- Modify the error message when audit is disabled to mention that it may be disabled [Orabug: 37040467]

[3.1.5-7]
- ausearch-checkpoint race condition fix
  Resolves: RHEL-86897

[3.1.5-6]
- Update end of event detection mechanism
  Resolves: RHEL-78323

[3.1.5-5]
- ausearch: correct search for DAEMON related events
- allow hex digits when interpreting tty data
  Resolves: RHEL-82279
- Fix TTY hostname in log messages
  Resolves: RHEL-78323

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20536-0.html
